channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Israel and Lebanon sign framework agreement
item.description: Israel and Lebanon signed a framework agreement on Friday after four days of negotiations in Washington, mediated by the Trump administration.

item.title: Uncertainty surrounds the Federal Reserve's direction
item.description: Forecasting the Fed's next moves has become a challenge, as analysts try to anticipate the tactics of a new chairman who remains opaque.

item.title: Cori Bush declines to commit to supporting Jeffries in 2027 if she regains her seat
item.description: Former Rep. Cori Bush (D-Mo.) told Axios on Friday she would not promise to vote for House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-N.Y.) as speaker if she returns to Congress.

item.title: GOP looks to Colombia as a model for election rules
item.description: Senate Republicans are pointing to Colombia as an example for stricter U.S. voting laws, using California as a counterpoint in their argument.
